name: Uptime Kuma
description: Beautiful self-hosted monitoring for all your services.

steps.instruction: Create your admin account: choose a username and strong password. Click 'Register'. This is the only account — there's no multi-user support

Add monitors for each HomeStack service: click '+ New Monitor' → Type = HTTP(s). Use Docker hostnames for reliability. Examples: http://radarr:7878, http://sonarr:8989, http://plex:32400, http://immich:2283, http://pihole:80. Click Save for each
Create API key: click Settings (gear icon, top right) → API Keys → click 'Add API Key' → name it 'homestack' → copy the key. Note: if you don't see API Keys, upgrade to Uptime Kuma v1.21+
Paste the Uptime Kuma API key
